steps.detail: PA and lateral views to confirm diagnosis and assess severity
Before initiating antibiotics if possible; blood cultures x2 if severe
Amoxicillin 1g PO TID for outpatient; Ceftriaxone 1g IV + Azithromycin 500mg IV for inpatient
SpO2 monitoring; supplemental O2 if SpO2 < 94%
Reassess in 48-72 hours; repeat imaging in 6 weeks if not improving
